should_trigger: format this corrections-letter markdown into a styled PDF
generate a PDF from the draft response markdown
render this markdown corrections letter to PDF and screenshot for QA
convert the response letter markdown to a deliverable PDF
run the markdown through the PDF formatter
should_not_trigger: analyze this corrections letter and ask the contractor questions
review this plan binder for compliance
extract a sheet from the plan PDF
fix a bug in the citation verifier
rationale: Must activate on PDF formatting requests where markdown is the input. Single-purpose formatting sub-agent — must NOT activate on research, analysis, or any work that touches the agent's reasoning over corrections content. The main agent re-invokes this skill with fix instructions if QA flags issues in the screenshot.
